data.body: C1 (524d) plan-review #2 = PASS (signed, 0 blocking, 20 advisory, 0 indeterminate; material 5b5de3a). Advisory triage: [absent-ref read contract 5,6,8,9,10] already handled — read returns None for absent ref (docstring+ADR+2 tests). [remote path not exercised 2,11] handled — test_ac0_blob_ref_roundtrips_through_remote drives acquire/release/read with remote=origin against a bare remote incl --force-with-lease with a blob OID [3,4]. [push not classified by _is_cas_mismatch 0,1] handled — _push_lease_cas translates a rejected lease into the shared update-ref exit-128 shape. [timeout/genuine-failure logging 7,16] fixed — consolidated one _git seam with logger.warning on timeout + on genuine push failure; tightened push-reject markers. [blob GC-safety 13,14 + blob-vs-commit rationale 19] added ADR paragraphs. Declined w/ justification: gitutil.run_git [12] (reconciler package uses its own raw subprocess like _advisory_lock), configurable timeouts [17] (YAGNI for C1, documented constants), _cas_once rule-of-three [18] (3rd caller is C2 steal; explicitly required seam). Epic (6c9c) review INDETERMINATE due to transient 429 (llm_ran=False); re-running.
